name: Braised Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the green part of the scallion into 2-inch pieces.
2. Combine all ingredients except meat, oil, and chicken stock in a bowl and set aside.
3. Heat the peanut oil in a heavy skillet. Brown the beef quickly on all sides.
4. Add the mixture from the bowl and cook, stirring to heat and blend, about 3 minutes.
5. Pour in the chicken stock and simmer covered for 90 minutes to 2 hours or until the meat is tender.
6. Slice the meat and serve hot or cold.
7. Reserve the gravy for master sauce. Strain through cheesecloth when cool and refrigerate in a covered dish.
